seoTitle: Boambolo vs Boat Harbour — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Boambolo and Boat Harbour. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Boambolo vs Boat Harbour: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Boambolo and Boat Harbour.
heading: Boambolo vs Boat Harbour — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boambolo, New South Wales and Boat Harbour, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boambolo has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Boat Harbour (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boambolo or Boat Harbour safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boambolo has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Boat Harbour scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boambolo scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Boat Harbour scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boambolo or Boat Harbour?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boambolo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
